Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stipulated Request To Mediate In Lieu Of Judicial Arbitraiton;
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-29-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-10-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Steven Walker's Motion for Stipulated Request to Mediate in Lieu of Judicial Arbitrtion is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 10/29/2007 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 8/22/2007 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212.
